fire_rating.ul_design: UL D902 / D916 (floor-ceiling assembly with protected beams)

components.name: Fluted Metal Deck
components.material: Galvanized steel deck — ASTM A653, Grade 33
components.description: Corrugated metal floor deck spanning between beams. Underside receives SFRM for fire rating.

components.name: Beam Top Flange
components.description: Top flange of supporting beam where deck bears. Deck-to-beam junction is the critical transition zone.

properties.deck_bearing_note: Deck rests on top flange — creates geometry change for SFRM application

components.name: SFRM on Deck Underside
components.description: Fireproofing applied to the underside of the metal deck between beams (field of deck). Fills flute valleys and covers flat pans.

properties.coverage: Full coverage of flute valleys and flat pans between ribs

components.name: SFRM on Beam
components.description: Fireproofing on the beam (3-sided where deck shields top flange, or 4-sided at exposed conditions)

properties.application: Spray-applied to web and bottom flange, into flute-to-flange gaps at top

components.name: Transition Zone
components.description: The critical zone where deck underside SFRM meets beam SFRM at the beam top flange. Must be continuous with no gaps or exposed steel.

properties.location: Beam top flange edge where deck terminates or changes direction
properties.deficiency_note: Most common inspection deficiency — applicators often leave a gap at this junction
properties.repair_method: Hand-trowel or re-spray to fill gap and achieve specified thickness

assembly_constraints.description: No gap permitted between deck SFRM and beam SFRM at the transition zone
assembly_constraints.rule: SFRM must be continuous from deck underside through beam flange edge onto beam web/flange surfaces

assembly_constraints.description: Thickness at transition must meet the more stringent of deck or beam SFRM requirement
assembly_constraints.rule: Measure thickness at transition zone — do not assume compliance from adjacent areas

assembly_constraints.description: Flute valleys at beam top flange must be filled
assembly_constraints.rule: SFRM must fill the triangular void between deck flute valley and beam top flange

assembly_constraints.description: Apply beam SFRM and deck SFRM in same pass where possible to ensure monolithic transition
assembly_constraints.rule: If applied in separate passes, second pass must bond to first with no cold joint
